sentences.target: Je pointe à huit heures au boulot.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pwɛ̃t a ɥit œʁ o bulo/

translations.fr: Je pointe à huit heures au boulot.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pwɛ̃t a ɥit œʁ o bulo/
translations.en: I clock in at eight at work.
translations.es: Ficho a las ocho en el trabajo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公司八点打卡上班。
translations.yue: 我八點喺公司打卡返工。
translations.ru: Я отмечаюсь на работе в восемь.
translations.pt: Eu bato o ponto às oito no trabalho.
translations.vi: Tôi chấm công lúc tám giờ ở công ty.
translations.ar: أسجّل الدوام الساعة الثامنة في العمل.
translations.nl: Ik klok om acht uur in op het werk.
translations.uk: Я відмічаюся на роботі о восьмій.
translations.hi: मैं दफ़्तर में आठ बजे हाज़िरी लगाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Odbijam kartę o ósmej w pracy.
translations.el: Χτυπάω κάρτα στις οκτώ στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg stempler inn klokka åtte på jobb.
translations.id: Saya absen masuk pukul delapan di kantor.
translations.sv: Jag stämplar in klockan åtta på jobbet.
translations.ro: Pontez la ora opt la serviciu.
translations.cs: V osm si v práci pípnu.
translations.da: Jeg stempler ind klokken otte på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 私は会社で8時に打刻します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular, performing the action.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular) of ‘pointer’ meaning ‘to clock in’; agrees with the subject ‘Je’.
Preposition introducing the time expression ‘à huit heures’.
Cardinal numeral modifying ‘heures’ to specify the time.
Common noun (feminine plural) functioning within the prepositional phrase to express time of day.
Contracted preposition (à + le) introducing the locative phrase ‘au boulot’.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition ‘au’; informal for ‘job/workplace’.

translations.vi: Cô ấy chỉ vào tấm áp phích.
translations.hi: वह पोस्टर की ओर इशारा करती है.
translations.ja: 彼女はポスターを指さす。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) of ‘pointer’ meaning ‘to point’.
Contracted preposition (de + le) introducing ‘du doigt’; forms an instrumental complement in the idiom ‘pointer du doigt’.
Common noun (masculine singular) complement of the preposition ‘du’ (instrument: with the finger).
Elided definite article (le/la) before a vowel-initial noun; marks definiteness of ‘affiche’.
Common noun (feminine singular), direct object of ‘pointe’ (the thing being pointed at).

sentences.target: On doit pointer nos heures aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On doit pointer nos heures aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We have to clock our hours today.
translations.es: Hoy tenemos que registrar nuestras horas.
translations.de: Wir müssen heute unsere Zeiten erfassen.
translations.it: Oggi dobbiamo registrare le nostre ore.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们得打卡记录工时。
translations.yue: 我哋今日要打卡記錄工時。
translations.ru: Сегодня нам нужно зафиксировать наши рабочие часы.
translations.pt: Hoje temos que registrar nossas horas.
translations.he: היום אנחנו צריכים לרשום את השעות שלנו.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta phải chấm công giờ làm.
translations.nl: We moeten vandaag onze uren registreren.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми маємо зафіксувати наші робочі години.
translations.hi: आज हमें अपने काम के घंटे दर्ज करने हैं.
translations.pl: Dziś musimy zarejestrować nasze godziny pracy.
translations.el: Σήμερα πρέπει να καταγράψουμε τις ώρες μας.
translations.nb: I dag må vi registrere timene våre.
translations.id: Hari ini kita harus mencatat jam kerja kita.
translations.sv: Idag måste vi registrera våra arbetstimmar.
translations.ro: Astăzi trebuie să înregistrăm orele noastre de lucru.
translations.cs: Dnes musíme zaznamenat své odpracované hodiny.
translations.da: I dag skal vi registrere vores arbejdstimer.
translations.ja: 今日は勤務時間を記録しなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun often meaning ‘we’; 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) of ‘devoir’; modal meaning ‘must/has to’, selecting an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘doit’ (modal construction).
Possessive determiner (1st person plural), agreeing in number with ‘heures’, modifying the noun.
Common noun (feminine plural), direct object of the infinitive ‘pointer’.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, specifying when the action occurs.

sentences.target: Ils pointent l'erreur sur le plan.

translations.fr: Ils pointent l'erreur sur le plan.
translations.en: They point out the error on the plan.
translations.es: Ellos señalan el error en el plano.
translations.de: Sie weisen auf den Fehler im Plan hin.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们指出图纸上的错误。
translations.yue: 佢哋指出圖紙上的錯誤。
translations.ru: Они указывают на ошибку на плане.
translations.pt: Eles apontam o erro no plano.
translations.vi: Họ chỉ ra lỗi trên bản vẽ.
translations.ar: إنهم يشيرون إلى الخطأ على المخطط.
translations.nl: Ze wijzen op de fout op het plan.
translations.uk: Вони вказують на помилку на плані.
translations.hi: वे नक्शे पर गलती की ओर इशारा करते हैं.
translations.nb: De peker på feilen på planen.
translations.sv: De pekar ut felet på ritningen.
translations.da: De peger på fejlen på planen.
translations.ja: 彼らは図面の誤りを指摘する。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural masculine (or mixed).
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural) of ‘pointer’ meaning ‘to point out’.
Elided definite article before a vowel-initial noun; marks definiteness of ‘erreur’.
Common noun (feminine singular), direct object of ‘pointent’ (the thing being identified).
Preposition introducing the locative phrase ‘sur le plan’.
Definite article (masculine singular) modifying ‘plan’.
Common noun (masculine singular), object of the preposition ‘sur’; denotes the drawing/blueprint.

jp: Je pointe à huit heures au boulot.
On doit pointer nos heures aujourd'hui.
Ils pointent l'erreur sur le plan.
fu: /ʒə pwɛ̃t a ɥit œʁ o bulo/
fr: Je pointe à huit heures au boulot.
On doit pointer nos heures aujourd'hui.
Ils pointent l'erreur sur le plan.
ipa: /ʒə pwɛ̃t a ɥit œʁ o bulo/
en: I clock in at eight at work.
We have to clock our hours today.
They point out the error on the plan.
